Alumni
Upcoming Events
Upcoming Alumni Events
We love seeing our Webbies and hearing about the wonderful things you are all achieving! Several times a year, Webb travels to different areas in the country and world to visit our alumni. We also hold local events around Claremont/Los Angeles as well. Click on the event below for more details on each event and to register!
List of 10 items.
April 10, 2026 - Webb in Hong Kong
Please join Dr. Theresa Smith, Head of School; Hector Martinez, Dean of College Guidance; and Kurt Johnson, Chief Advancement Officer for a reception in Hong Kong!
The American Club
Friday, April 10
4:30-6:30 p.m.
Hosted by Michael '92 & Alicia Chang P '23, '27, '29
Click here to RSVP by April 3.
Look Who's Attending:
Michael '92 & Alicia Chang P '23, '27, '29

February 22, 2026 - Junior Career Evening
at The Webb Schools
Thank you to our wonderful alumni and friends for speaking at Junior Career Evening! It was a magical evening filled with excitement and inspiration as our speakers shared career stories and tips to help aid in their career development.
If you're interested in returning to Webb to speak about your career journey or a career topic, please email
alumni@webb.org
for more details.
2026 Speakers:
Juliana Base '19
Alexis de la Rosa '11
Ben Dey '00
Jordan Fang '19
Stephanie Ho '04
Megan Key
Douglas Lee '96

Kyle Smith '12

The Webb School admits students of any race, color, national and ethnic origin to all the rights, privileges, programs, and activities generally accorded or made available to students at the school.
